source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
distilled_thesis: The bounded route binds gift to descent: to give is already to move downward toward others rather than remain above them.
